name: Working with Odoo offline
snippet:

name: Offline mode — Odoo master documentation
snippet: Odoo supports offline access for apps and modules built using standard Odoo framework components. For performance reasons, Odoo allocates a maximum of 2 GB for offline data. When this limit is reached, the oldest data is removed to make room for the most recent activity.
